title: Looking for Hotel Manager at EazyDiner Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at EazyDiner Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Jaipur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About EazyDiner Ventures Solutions:
EazyDiner Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in F&B Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EazyDiner Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
